quest.007CD364F96C2912.quest_desc.original: &aFree Runner&r boots provide little protection, but prevent all fall damage.
quest.007CD364F96C2912.quest_desc.translation: &a自由助跑器&r提供的防護不高，但可完全免疫摔落傷害。

quest.00A7C1FE54F86429.quest_desc.original:
&eApotheosis&r overhauls the vanilla enchanting system with three new values, allowing for high-level enchants with upgradable progression. You will want to manage these values as you progress through upgrading your enchanting setup:

&aEterna&r: The power of the enchanting table, capped based on the tier of your bookshelves. This stat determines the maximum level of enchants.

&cQuanta&r: The chaos inherent when enchanting at higher power. This determines the randomness of enchants.

&dArcana&r: The overall quality and quantity of the enchantments. This determines the rarity of enchants, as well as how many enchants are applied per use.
quest.00A7C1FE54F86429.quest_desc.translation:
《&e神化&r》澈底改造了原版的附魔系統，讓你能在可持續升級的進度中，追求更高等級附魔。

你在強化附魔設置時，必須同時管理這三項全新數值：

&a位階&r：附魔台的基礎強度，上限取決於你使用的書櫃階級。此數值決定附魔的最高等級。

&c量子化&r：高強度附魔時伴隨的混沌值。此數值決定附魔結果的隨機性。

&d阿卡那&r：附魔的整體品質與數量。此數值決定附魔稀有度，以及每次可附加的附魔數量。

quest.00A7DEFCF07BC63A.quest_desc.original:
The &zRed Katar&r is the ultimate weapon from &6ProjectE&r.

Set a keybind to ProjectE's Extra Function and it will deal 25 damage to everything around you with each activation.
quest.00A7DEFCF07BC63A.quest_desc.translation:
&z紅物質拳刃&r是來自《&6等價交換&r》終極武器。

請為《&6等價交換&r》的「額外功能」綁定快捷鍵（預設 C）；

每次發動能力時，都會對周遭的所有目標造成 25 點傷害。

quest.011DBD2652E49B97.quest_desc.original:
&6Apotheosis&r has a new &bWorld Tier&r system that can be accessed using "CTRL + T" by default.

["You start at ", {"text": "Haven", "color": "#7E7E7E"}, " upon acquiring your first ", {"text": "Affix Item", "color": "#55FF55"}, ", and unlock more tiers as you advance in the mod."]

Higher tiers increase the difficulty and rewards across all dimensions. These rewards can be checked in the Tiers menu ("CTRL + T").

In order to progress your &bWorld Tier&r, you can check the &6Apotheosis&r advancements using "L" by default, and going to the tab with a skull to guide you through the progression.

You can also check the next page on this quest for all of the requirements.
{@pagebreak}
&bWorld Tiers&r

["", {"text": "Haven", "color": "#7E7E7E"}, " - Acquire your first ", {"text": "Affix", "color": "#55FFFF"}, " gear."]

["", {"text": "Frontier", "color": "#55FF55"}, " - Equip a full set of ", {"text": "Common", "color": "#7E7E7E"}, " or higher ", {"text": "Affix", "color": "#55FFFF"}, " gear."]

["", {"text": "Ascent", "color": "#5454FC"}, " - Equip a full set of ", {"text": "Uncommon", "color": "#55FF55"}, " or higher ", {"text": "Affix", "color": "#55FFFF"}, " gear and slay an ", {"text": "Apotheosis", "color": "#FFAA00"}, " boss monster."]

["", {"text": "Summit", "color": "#B900B9"}, " - Equip a full set of ", {"text": "Rare", "color": "#5454FC"}, " or higher ", {"text": "Affix", "color": "#55FFFF"}, " gear and slay the Wither"]

["", {"text": "Pinnacle", "color": "#EA6F14"}, " - Equip a full set of ", {"text": "Epic", "color": "#B900B9"}, " or higher ", {"text": "Affix", "color": "#55FFFF"}, " gear and slay the Chicken Jockey Boss"]

Changes for each tier can be checked in the &bWorld Tiers&r menu ("CTRL + T" by default).
quest.011DBD2652E49B97.quest_desc.translation:
《&6神化&r》新增了&b世界階級&r系統，預設可用「CTRL + T」開啟。

["當你取得第一件", {"text": "詞綴物品", "color": "#55FF55"}, "時，會從", {"text": "避風港", "color": "#7E7E7E"}, "開始，並隨著模組進度逐步解鎖更高階級。"]

更高的階級會提升所有維度的難度與獎勵。獎勵內容可在階級選單（CTRL + T）中查看。

要推進你的&b世界階級&r，可用預設鍵「L」查看《&6神化&r》進度，並切到骷髏圖示分頁來依序完成。

此任務下一頁也整理了所有需求。
{@pagebreak}
&b世界階級&r

["", {"text": "避風港", "color": "#7E7E7E"}, " - 取得第一件", {"text": "詞綴", "color": "#55FFFF"}, "裝備。"]

["", {"text": "邊境", "color": "#55FF55"}, " - 裝備全套", {"text": "普通", "color": "#7E7E7E"},"或更高稀有度的", {"text": "詞綴", "color": "#55FFFF"}, "裝備。"]

["", {"text": "攀升", "color": "#5454FC"}, " - 裝備全套", {"text": "罕見", "color": "#55FF55"}, "或更高稀有度的", {"text": "詞綴", "color": "#55FFFF"}, "裝備，並擊殺一隻", {"text": "神化", "color": "#FFAA00"}, "入侵者。"]

["", {"text": "高峰", "color": "#B900B9"}, " - 裝備全套", {"text": "稀有", "color": "#5454FC"}, "或更高稀有度的", {"text": "詞綴", "color": "#55FFFF"}, "裝備，並擊殺凋零怪。"]

["", {"text": "頂點", "color": "#EA6F14"}, " - 裝備全套", {"text": "史詩", "color": "#B900B9"}, "或更高稀有度的", {"text": "詞綴", "color": "#55FFFF"}, "裝備，並擊殺雞騎士 Boss。"]

每個階級的詳細變化可在&b世界階級&r選單中查看（預設「CTRL + T」）。

quest.012AEBFDB1F1512E.quest_desc.original: &eJust Dire Things&r armor can be tiered up via &aSmithing Templates&r and accept more &2Upgrades&r as they rank up to armor better than netherite.
quest.012AEBFDB1F1512E.quest_desc.translation:
《&eJust Dire Things&r》的盔甲能透過&a鍛造模板&r升階，
且隨階級提升可安裝更多&2升級&r，最終性能會超越獄髓盔甲。

quest.0191028C1E2EAA31.quest_desc.original:
&eMalum's &aScythes&r allow you to reap &bSpirits&r from your enemies.

The &dEdge of Deliverance&r can be exceptional for early bosses with its critical enhancement passive effect and increased attack reach.
quest.0191028C1E2EAA31.quest_desc.translation:
《&e靈災&r》的&a鐮刀&r能讓你從敵人身上收穫&b精魂&r。

&d挽魂鋒鐮&r具備強化暴擊的被動效果與更長攻擊距離，對前期 Boss 特別好用。

quest.01D2CEAF59872C33.quest_desc.original:
The &aGem Cutting Table&r is used to upgrade &bGems&r.

Upgrading a &bGem&r costs &aGem Dust&r, rarity materials, and a second &bGem&r of the same rarity. The material and dust cost of upgrading a &bGem&r increases with its rarity.

The exact upgrade costs will be shown in the table's interface.
quest.01D2CEAF59872C33.quest_desc.translation:
&a寶石切割台&r用於升級&b寶石&r。

升級&b寶石&r需消耗&a寶石粉&r、稀有度材料，以及另一顆同稀有度&b寶石&r。稀有度越高，所需粉末與材料越多。

確切升級成本會顯示在切割台介面中。

quest.056990503617C147.quest_desc.original:
&dWyvern&r tools consume power instead of durability and can be customized via modules placed into their inventories.

Their module inventory can be accessed via the keybind &eTool Modules&r, which isn't bound by default.

&eNote&r: To craft this, you must have the &cAdvanced Machine Block&r &6World Engine Upgrade&r.
quest.056990503617C147.quest_desc.translation:
&d雙足飛龍工具&r以能量取代耐久，並可透過其內建模組欄位進行高度客製化。

其模組欄位可透過「&e升級模組介面&r」快捷鍵開啟，預設為
「Shift + C」。

&e注意&r：要製作此物品，你必須先擁有&c高級機器方塊&r&6世界引擎升級&r。

quest.05C3502C9F7BB7A3.quest_desc.original:
The &6MekaSuit&r can be crafted with some polonium and other high-end &eMekanism&r materials. These powered pieces of gear are very strong on their own, but can be vastly augmented with various &bModules&r from fortune to flight!

Simply place the crafted &bModule&r of choice in the similarly designed slot of the &aModification Station&r, and the piece of gear it applies to in the slot pointed to by the arrow.
quest.05C3502C9F7BB7A3.quest_desc.translation:
&6Meka 套裝&r能使用釙與其他高階《&e通用機械&r》材料製作。

這套耗能裝備本身就很強大，還能透過各種&b模組&r大幅強化，從幸運到飛行都有！

只要把你要安裝的&b模組&r，放進&a改裝站&r的對應欄位，再把對應裝備放入箭頭指向的欄位即可。

quest.0AD2F3DB33241628.quest_desc.original:
&eArs &aSpell Books&r are versatile tools that can create and cast spells.

&eArs &2Tools&r become accessible after completing &dThe Magician's&r &3Source Upgrade&r. These magical tools can provide a vast amount of customization via spell-imbuement.
quest.0AD2F3DB33241628.quest_desc.translation:
《&e新生魔藝&r》的&a法術書&r是非常多樣化的工具，可用來創造與施放各種法術。

在你完成&d魔法長老&r的&3魔源升級&r之後，就能開始使用《&e新生魔藝&r》的&2魔法工具&r。

這些工具能透過寫入法術，提供極大程度的客製化功能。

quest.0ADBBF7BA99D2811.quest_desc.original: &eActually Additions' &aAll-In-One-Tools&r are handy additions to save you hotbar space, as they act as every tool at once!
quest.0ADBBF7BA99D2811.quest_desc.translation: 《&e實用拓展&r》的&a全能工具&r非常便利，能同時作為所有工具使用，為你節省快捷欄的空間！

quest.0B65713A23351790.quest_desc.original:
The &dWyvern Sword&r is a powered sword that allows for a ton of customization options.

&6Draconic Evolution&r gear has its own interface that can store modular upgrades inside of each item.

This allows you to upgrade any of the mod's items in many different ways using &dModules&r.
quest.0B65713A23351790.quest_desc.translation:
&d雙足飛龍武器&r以能量取代耐久，並可透過其內建模組欄位進行高度客製化。

其模組欄位可透過「&e升級模組介面&r」快捷鍵開啟，預設為
「Shift + C」。

&e注意&r：要製作此物品，你必須先擁有&c高級機器方塊&r&6世界引擎升級&r。

quest.0CA6DA721A97542F.quest_desc.translation:
在 &eCurio 飾品欄&r中，有數百種物品可供你裝備。

點擊物品欄介面中的這顆小按鈕，來開啟你的飾品欄：

{image:curios:textures/gui/curios/button_small.png width:25 height:25 align:center}

若你想在 &eJEI&f 中搜尋特定部位的飾品，可以在部位名稱前
輸入「欄位：」，例如：&a欄位： 頭飾&r或&a欄位： 足飾&r。

&e譯者註&f：由於《&eCurios&f》模組的問題，搜尋時請務必在
冒號「：」後方加一個&n空格&r（例如：&a欄位：&n &r&a頭飾&r）。

這是因為這空格被寫死在程式碼裡，沒留空格會搜不到東西。

quest.0D38D67E3FD120CB.quest_desc.original:
["", {"text": "Chaotic", "color": "rainbow"}, " weapons are the final upgrades to ", {"text": "Draconic", "color": "gold", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "5388B67410670702" }, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Draconic Weapons Quest"}}, " weapons, with the most room for ", {"text": "Upgrade Modules", "color": "green"}, " and maximum customizability."]

You can also upgrade into or craft the &zChaotic Staff of Power&r, an All-In-One tool and weapon.

Their module inventory can be accessed via the keybind &eTool Modules&r, which isn't bound by default.
quest.0D38D67E3FD120CB.quest_desc.translation:
["", {"text": "混沌武器", "color": "rainbow"}, "是", {"text": "神龍武器", "color": "gold", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "5388B67410670702" }, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "前往神龍武器任務"}}, "的最終升級，擁有更多", {"text": "升級模組", "color": "green"}, "空間與最高自訂性。"]

你也可以升級或直接製作&z混沌力量權杖&r，這是一把將工具與武器合二為一的裝備。

其模組欄位可透過「&e升級模組介面&r」快捷鍵開啟，預設為
「Shift + C」。

quest.0EE35D6E57FAD973.quest_desc.original:
One of the most useful items for any enchanting setup!

The &6Enchantment Library&r acts as a storage for enchantments. With enough low level enchants, it can also create books of higher level enchants for you.

&eNote&r: This is a &zShop Only Item&r!
quest.0EE35D6E57FAD973.quest_desc.translation:
這是任何附魔設置中最實用的配備之一！

&6附魔圖書館&r可儲存附魔。只要累積足夠的低等附魔，也能合成更高等級的附魔書。

&e備註&r：這是&z商店限定物品&r！

quest.11A35E8F97ACA240.quest_desc.original:
["", {"text": "Draconic", "color": "gold"}, " tools are upgraded versions of ", {"text": "Wyvern", "color": "light_purple", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "056990503617C147" }, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Wyvern Tools Quest"}}, " tools, with room for more ", {"text": "Upgrade Modules", "color": "green"}, " and better customizability."]

You can also craft the &6Draconic Staff of Power&r, an All-In-One tool and weapon.

Their module inventory can be accessed via the keybind &eTool Modules&r, which isn't bound by default.

&eNote&r: To craft these, you must have the &cAdvanced Machine Block&r and the &dDraconic Energy&r &6World Engine Upgrades&r.
quest.11A35E8F97ACA240.quest_desc.translation:
["", {"text": "神龍工具", "color": "gold"}, "是", {"text": "雙足飛龍工具", "color": "light_purple", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "056990503617C147" }, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "前往雙足飛龍工具任務"}}, "的升級版本，擁有更多", {"text": "升級模組", "color": "green"}, "空間與更高自訂性。"]

你也可以製作&6神龍力量權杖&r，這是一把將工具與武器合二為一的裝備。

其模組欄位可透過「&e升級模組介面&r」快捷鍵開啟，預設為
「Shift + C」。

&e注意&r：要製作此物品，你必須先擁有&c高級機器方塊&r&6世界引擎升級&r。

quest.11CC48D772573E73.quest_desc.original:
&zInfinity Weapons&r deal an infinite amount of damage.

&7&oLiterally performs the '/kill' command on mobs.
quest.11CC48D772573E73.quest_desc.translation:
&z無盡武器&r能造成無限的傷害。

&7&o實際上就是對目標執行了「/kill」指令。

quest.137039009E8EBA03.quest_desc.original:
&6ProjectE&r has several very strong tools that can be made once you have your hands on enough EMC and a &cNetherite Smithing Template&r.

These tools can be charged (default: "V") with EMC to empower powerful Area of Effect abilities when Right-Clicking each tool.

&eNote&r: To craft these, you must have the &aMachine Block&r &6World Engine Upgrade&r.
quest.137039009E8EBA03.quest_desc.translation:
當你取得足夠的 EMC 與&c獄髓鍛造模板&r後，《&6等價交換&r》
可製作多種非常強力的工具。

這些工具可消耗 EMC 進行充能（預設鍵：「V」），
讓你在右鍵使用時發動強力的範圍效果能力。

&e注意&r：要製作這些工具，你必須先有&a機器方塊&r&6世界引擎升級&r。

quest.137EC884018376A1.quest_desc.original:
&cNetherite&r gear makes for some great armor once you have your hands on &aAncient Debris&r and a &cNetherite Smithing Template&r..

["You may get ", {"text": "Ancient Debris", "color": "green"}, " early by going to the ", { "text": "Nether Dungeon", "color": "red", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": {"action": "change_page", "value": "21A521011401074F"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Nether Dungeon Quest"}}, ", which can spawn in the Deepslate Ring." ]
quest.137EC884018376A1.quest_desc.translation:
當你取得&a遠古遺骸&r與&c獄髓鍛造模板&r後，&c獄髓&r裝備會是非常優秀的盔甲選擇。

["你可以提早前往", {"text": "地獄地牢", "color": "red", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": {"action": "change_page", "value": "21A521011401074F"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "前往地獄地牢任務"}}, "取得", {"text": "遠古遺骸", "color": "green"}, "，該地牢會生成於深板岩環帶中。"]

quest.1666835CA3297C7D.quest_desc.original:
There are 2 special &aArtisan Scrolls&r that will teach you how to craft &6Duality&r jewelry.

This jewelry takes both the attributes from the &eMetal&r and the &dGem&r, and has a higher quality overall.

&eNote&r: Both of these recipes need the &dEnchanting&r &6World Engine Upgrade&r.
quest.1666835CA3297C7D.quest_desc.translation:
有 2 種特殊的&a工匠卷軸&r，可讓你學會製作&6雙生&r飾品。

這類飾品會同時繼承&e金屬&r與&d寶石&r的屬性，整體品質也更高。

&e注意&r：這兩種配方都需要&d附魔&r&6世界引擎升級&r。

quest.17DE59BAD714DE63.quest_desc.original:
Lots of cooking recipes require &bMilk&r.

That's why you should just shove a &6Cow in a Jar&r. When added to the &bKitchen Multiblock&r, this will provide recipes with Milk Buckets if they call for it.

But how do you get one? First, you need to make a &aMilk Jar&r. This can store milk by itself, but you'll want a renewable source of Milk for your kitchen.
{@pagebreak}
Next, you'll need to place the Milk Jar in a hole that's big enough where a Cow can fit in.

Lure a Cow into the hole where it is directly on top of the Milk Jar, then drop an Anvil into the hole. This will smoosh the Cow into the Jar!

This will provide milk slowly overtime for your Kitchen.

&eNote:&r This same thing can be done for Fluid Cows!
quest.17DE59BAD714DE63.quest_desc.translation:
許多烹飪配方都需要用到&b鮮奶&r。

這就是為什麼你應該直接把一隻&6罐中乳牛&r塞進廚房！

當它加入&a廚房多方塊結構&r後，只要配方需要鮮奶桶，它就能直接提供。

但該如何獲得這一罐「乳牛」呢？首先，你需要製作一個&a牛奶罐&r。

它本身就能儲存鮮奶，但為了你的廚房，你會需要一個可再生的鮮奶來源。
{@pagebreak}
接下來，你需要將牛奶罐放在一個足以容納一隻牛的深坑底部。

將牛引誘進坑中，使其直接踩在牛奶罐上方，接著使一個鐵砧墜落到坑內。這會直接把牛「擠」進罐子裡！

這能為你的廚房持續提供鮮奶。

&e注意&r：同樣的方法也適用於流體牛！

quest.1A89ACDC528588D5.quest_desc.original:
&bCelestigem&r is the next tier for armor from &6Just Dire Things&r.

Instead of using durability, this armor uses &cenergy&r instead, and can have even more upgrades that can be installed.

These can be made once you've made a trip out to the &dAncient City&r and made &dVoidshimmer Goo&r.
quest.1A89ACDC528588D5.quest_desc.translation:
&b天體寶石&r是《&6Just Dire Things&r》的下一階盔甲。

這套盔甲以&c能量&r取代耐久，並可安裝更多升級。

前往&d遠古城市&r並製作出&d虛輝凝漿&r後即可製作。

quest.1B20BEE2BE4476A7.quest_desc.original:
&eOritech's &aCybernetic Upgrades&r allow you to go full cyberpunk and install toggleable upgrades directly to your character.

These upgrades may require certain research stations, and range from things like increasing your movement speed or attack damage to making your player permanently invisible, or granting you creative flight.
quest.1B20BEE2BE4476A7.quest_desc.translation:
《&e起源科技&r》的&a賽博生化改造&r，能讓你化身賽博龐克，在身上安裝可開關的改造插件。

這些改造可能需要特定研究站，效果從提升移動速度、攻擊傷害，到永久隱形，甚至賦予創造模式飛行的能力都有。

quest.1B3B2B9697D7AEA6.quest_desc.original:
&dEclipse Alloy&r tools are the final tier of tools from &6Just Dire Things&r.

These are powered tools that can use the best upgrades from the mod.

These can be made once you've defeated the &dChicken Jockey&r and made &dShadowpulse Goo&r.
quest.1B3B2B9697D7AEA6.quest_desc.translation:
&d日蝕合金&r工具是《&6Just Dire Things&r》的最終工具階級。

這些是耗能工具，可使用模組中最頂級的升級。

擊敗&d雞騎士&r並製作出&d影脈凝漿&r後即可製作。

quest.1C6508B8B2C94CAF.quest_desc.original:
These power-consuming tools can be upgraded within a &aModification Table&r.

Upgrades can be installed to increase mining reach and speed, or apply silk-touch or fortune.
quest.1C6508B8B2C94CAF.quest_desc.translation:
這把耗能工具可以在&a改造台&r中，透過安裝升級進一步擴充功能。

像是延伸方塊的互動距離、挖掘速度，以及套用絲綢之觸或幸運效果。

quest.213FE1D19D589513.quest_desc.original:
&eBaubley Heart Crystals&r allows you to increase your maximum health by up to 80 hearts (160 health points). This can be done by placing up to 20 canisters of each tier inside the &aHeart Amulet&r.

&cRed Hearts&r can drop when killing hostile mobs.

&eYellow Hearts&r are dropped by most bosses.

&aGreen Hearts&r are dropped by the &dWarden&r and &cIgnis&r.

&9Blue Hearts&r are dropped by &zMighty Ender Chicken&r, &6Leviathan&r, &6Tyros&r, and &cMaledictus&r.
quest.213FE1D19D589513.quest_desc.translation:
《&e心形墜飾&r》能讓你增加最大生命值，最高可額外提升 80 顆心（160 點血量）。
只要在&a心形墜飾&r中，放入各階級最多 20 個心罐即可達成。

&c紅心&r：擊殺敵對生物時有機率掉落。

&e黃心&r：大多數的 Boss 都會掉落。

&a綠心&r：由&d伏守者&r與&c熾焰魔&r掉落。

&9藍心&r：由&z偉大終界雞&r、&6利維坦&r、&6提洛斯&r，以及&c咒翼靈骸&r掉落。

quest.226E5BD0BEB1BA75.quest_desc.original: These are unique shelves that provide certain bonuses like adding 100% &cQuanta&r, or removing &cQuanta&r and &5Arcana&r.
quest.226E5BD0BEB1BA75.quest_desc.translation:
這些特殊書櫃可提供特定加成，例如增加 100% &c量子化&r，
或降低&c量子化&r與&5阿卡那&r。

quest.23562C59CEDE9879.quest_desc.original:
&eDeus Ex Machina&f empowers you when fighting off against countless monsters within this stone world.

Each death against the same boss grants you damage resistance and increased damage dealt against your killer.
quest.23562C59CEDE9879.quest_desc.translation:
《&e機械降神&f》會在你位於這個石頭世界中，對抗無數怪物時強化你的能力。

每當你被同一個 Boss 擊敗時，你都會獲得額外的傷害抗性
，並提高對該 Boss 造成的傷害。

quest.25023C87AA259688.quest_desc.original:
While not offering much protection in the form of armor, holding down "Shift" while wearing a full set of this armor will turn you into a cardboard box small enough to avoid being detected by mobs.

&7&oThis could be handy for looting.
quest.25023C87AA259688.quest_desc.translation:
雖然這套盔甲提供的保護效果不強，

但穿著整套盔甲時，按住「Shift」潛行，你就會變成紙箱，體型小到足以避開生物偵測。

&7&o這在搜刮戰利品時可能非常方便。

quest.25C6F433BD3128C4.quest_desc.original: This ranged 6-shot revolver from &eImmersive Engineering&r can be loaded up with different types of bullets and addons.
quest.25C6F433BD3128C4.quest_desc.translation:
這把來自《&e沉浸工程&r》的左輪手槍，同時能填裝 6 發不同
類型的子彈，還能透過安裝升級套件來擴充功能。

quest.268CC540E5B605A9.quest_desc.original:
The final tier of bookshelves is locked behind the infusion of &dDragon's Breath&r.

To do this, you will need &a80&r &6Eterna&r, between &a15&r to &a30&r &cQuanta&r, and at least &a60&r &dArcana&r.

If you don't have enough &dArcana,&r you can use candles, which provide a small boost.

&eNote&r: &dDragon's Breath&r can be obtained from the &dChicken Jockey&r fight.
quest.268CC540E5B605A9.quest_desc.translation:
最終階級書櫃，需要先完成對&d龍之吐息&r的灌注才會解鎖。

要進行注入，你需要 &a80&r &6位階&r、介於 &a15%&r 至 &a30%&r 的&c量子化&r，以及至少 &a60%&r 的&d阿卡那&r。

若&d阿卡那&r不足，可用蠟燭提供小幅補強。

&e備註&r：&d龍之吐息&r可在與&d雞騎士&r的戰鬥中取得。

quest.26B74124E89189F7.quest_desc.original:
The base shelf for the final tier of enchanting.

Besides being locked behind &dInfused Dragon's Breath&r, Endshelves are relatively cheap.
quest.26B74124E89189F7.quest_desc.translation:
最終附魔階級所使用的基礎書櫃。

除了受限於&d灌注龍息&r的解鎖條件外，終界書櫃整體造價其實不高。

quest.26CE741ECA36BBC5.quest_desc.original:
&eJust Dire Things&r tools can be tiered up via &aSmithing Templates&r and accept more &2Upgrades&r as they rank up to tools better than netherite.

&bFerricore&r and &cBlazegold&r are the first two tiers of tools available.
quest.26CE741ECA36BBC5.quest_desc.translation:
《&eJust Dire Things&r》的工具，能透過&a鍛造模板&r升階，
且隨階級提升可安裝更多&2升級&r，最終性能會超越獄髓工具。

&b核鐵&r與&c烈焰金&r是前期可取得的兩種工具階級。

quest.26D7C5298D95C69A.quest_desc.original:
When crafting &bJewelry&r, &aBanding Materials&r can be used by themselves to grant effects and/or stat increases.

Their main use, however, is to multiply &aGem&r effects with their quality multiplier.

While most vanilla gems will work, you can also search for &ajewelry_metal&r in JEI for a list.
quest.26D7C5298D95C69A.quest_desc.translation:
製作&b飾品&r時，&a戒指材料&r本身就能提供效果或屬性提升。

不過它們的主要用途，是透過品質倍率放大&a寶石&r效果。

雖然大多數原版金屬都能使用，你也可以在 JEI 搜尋「&ajewelry_metal&r」查看完整清單。

quest.2722C0E2E8993658.quest_desc.original:
The centerpiece of a fully completed enchanting setup. 

The &dDraconic Endshelf&r provides no additional stats, but will boost your &aEterna&r by 20, allowing you to hit a max of &6100&r.

The &dPearlescent Endshelf&r is the best general-purpose bookshelf, providing significant amounts of both &cQuanta&r and &dArcana&r.
quest.2722C0E2E8993658.quest_desc.translation:
完整附魔設置的核心組成元件。 

&d龍族終界書櫃&r不提供額外屬性，
但可額外增加 20 &a位階&r，讓你達到最高的 &6100&r。

&d璀璨終界書櫃&r是最泛用的高階書櫃，可同時提供大量&c量子化&r與&d阿卡那&r。

quest.276D2B384F21AC10.quest_desc.original: &eJust Dire Things&r weapons can be tiered up via &aSmithing Templates&r and accept more &2Upgrades&r as they rank up to tools better than netherite.
quest.276D2B384F21AC10.quest_desc.translation:
《&eJust Dire Things&r》的武器，能透過&a鍛造模板&r升階，
且隨階級提升可安裝更多&2升級&r，最終性能會超越獄髓武器。

quest.28E63B302DFCF6D9.quest_desc.original:
Depending on your enchanting setup, you might need a little boost of &dArcana&r.

Candles placed around the &dEnchanting Table&r work great for this!
quest.28E63B302DFCF6D9.quest_desc.translation:
依你的附魔設置不同，你可能會需要額外補一些&d阿卡那&r。

在&d附魔台&r周圍擺放蠟燭就是很好的做法！

quest.2DF77DA2ED65FBAC.quest_desc.original:
The &dWyvern Chestpiece&r is a powered piece of armor that allows for a ton of customization options.

&6Draconic Evolution&r gear has its own interface that can store modular upgrades inside each piece of gear which can be accessed via a keybind (&eTool Modules&r).

This allows you to upgrade this chestpiece in many different ways using &aUpgrade Modules&r.
quest.2DF77DA2ED65FBAC.quest_desc.translation:
&d雙足飛龍護胸&r是一種耗能盔甲，並可透過其內建模組欄位進行高度客製化。

其模組欄位可透過「&e升級模組介面&r」快捷鍵開啟，預設為
「Shift + C」。

&e注意&r：要製作此物品，你必須先擁有&c高級機器方塊&r&6世界引擎升級&r。

quest.2F2DC018DD6A2A23.quest_desc.original:
&aGems&r are the part of most &bJewelry&r that grants effects or attributes.

Different pieces of &bJewelry&r are affected by &aGems&r in different ways, so be sure to check each piece carefully before crafting.

While most vanilla gems will work, you can also search for &ajewelry_gem&r in JEI for a list.
quest.2F2DC018DD6A2A23.quest_desc.translation:
&a寶石&r是多數&b飾品&r中提供效果或屬性的部件。

不同的&b飾品&r受&a寶石&r影響的方式各不相同，製作前請先仔細確認每一件。

雖然大多數原版寶石都能使用，你也可以在 JEI 搜尋「&ajewelry_gem&r」查看完整清單。

quest.3208AF90091D1B6B.quest_desc.translation:
使用&a簡易重鑄台&r，你可以為物品重鑄出全新的詞綴。

重鑄不限於已有&b詞綴&r的物品，任何符合條件的物品都可反覆重鑄。

&a簡易重鑄台&r最多只能重鑄到&9稀有&r等級。若要重鑄更高稀有度，需升級此工作台。
{@pagebreak}
重鑄台有三個輸入欄位：

- 中央欄位放置要重鑄的物品；

- 左上欄位放置你要重鑄到該稀有度所需的材料；

- 右下欄位放置&a重生咒符&r，作為重鑄材料。

每個稀有度重鑄都有基礎經驗、咒符與材料成本；

若選擇其他兩種結果，成本可能會提升至 2 或 3 倍。

quest.3382AC7FEFE0B76E.quest_desc.original: ["You may get ", {"text": "Ancient Debris", "color": "green"}, " early by going to the ", { "text": "Nether Dungeon", "color": "red", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": {"action": "change_page", "value": "21A521011401074F"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Nether Dungeon Quest"}}, ", which can spawn in the Deepslate Ring." ]
quest.3382AC7FEFE0B76E.quest_desc.translation: ["你可以提早前往", {"text": "地獄地牢", "color": "red", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": {"action": "change_page", "value": "21A521011401074F"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "前往地獄地牢任務"}}, "取得", {"text": "遠古遺骸", "color": "green"}, "，該地牢會生成於深板岩環帶中。"]

quest.353F6C94B5D5FF0B.quest_desc.original:
To push your &6Eterna&r even higher, you will need to create and infuse &3Deepshelves&r.

These shelves can push your &6Eterna&r to a max of &a75&r. 

You can also use a &zDeepshelf of Arcane Treasures&r to allow your enchanting table to enchant &zTreasure Enchantments&r.

&eNote&r: Deepshelves can be used for a &6World Engine Upgrade&r.
quest.353F6C94B5D5FF0B.quest_desc.translation:
若要把&6位階&r再往上提升，你需要製作並灌注&3深板岩書櫃&r。

這類書櫃可將&6位階&r上限提升至 &a75&r。 

你還能使用&z祕寶深板岩書櫃&r，讓附魔台能附出&z寶藏附魔&r。

&e備註&r：深板岩書櫃可用於&6世界引擎升級&r。

quest.371D1FEFBD49CCFF.quest_desc.original:
&bCelestigem&r is the next tier for weapons from &6Just Dire Things&r.

Instead of using durability, these weapons use &cenergy&r instead, and can have even more upgrades that can be installed.

These can be made once you've made a trip out to the &dAncient City&r and made &dVoidshimmer Goo&r.
quest.371D1FEFBD49CCFF.quest_desc.translation:
&b天體寶石&r是《&6Just Dire Things&r》的下一階武器。

這些武器以&c能量&r取代耐久，並可安裝更多升級。

前往&d遠古城市&r並製作出&d虛輝凝漿&r後即可製作。

quest.37F99696A47264FD.quest_desc.original: This chapter is all about teaching you some of the different ways to craft, enhance, and enchant any gear you might need on your adventures!
quest.37F99696A47264FD.quest_desc.translation: 本章節將以不同方式，教你如何合成、強化以及附魔在冒險途中，所需的各種裝備。

quest.3900E67C8B833980.quest_desc.original:
&aArtisan Scrolls&r can be found as loot or from buying them from &zShops&r.

To learn a &bJewel&r blueprint simply right-click with an &aArtisan Scroll&r in hand.
quest.3900E67C8B833980.quest_desc.translation:
&a工匠卷軸&r可透過戰利品取得，或在&z商店&r直接購買。

要學習&b飾品&r藍圖，只要手持&a工匠卷軸&r並按下右鍵即可。

quest.39758AAD01EEB3C8.quest_desc.original:
Depending on the route you take for shelves, you might need some extra &cQuanta&r to hit infusion levels.

&cSkulls&r work great and provide a &a+5&r boost to &cQuanta&r!
quest.39758AAD01EEB3C8.quest_desc.translation:
依你選擇的書櫃路線不同，可能會需要額外補充&c量子化&r才能達到灌注門檻。

&c骷髏頭顱&r很好用，可提供 &a+5%&r 的&c量子化&r加成！

quest.39F10D110D7E77B7.quest_desc.original:
&cNetherite&r tools are great to use once you have your hands on  some &aAncient Debris&r and a &cNetherite Smithing Template&r.

["You may get ", {"text": "Ancient Debris", "color": "green"}, " early by going to the ", { "text": "Nether Dungeon", "color": "red", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": {"action": "change_page", "value": "21A521011401074F"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Nether Dungeon Quest"}}, ", which can spawn in the Deepslate Ring."]
quest.39F10D110D7E77B7.quest_desc.translation:
當你取得&a遠古遺骸&r與&c獄髓鍛造模板&r後，&c獄髓&r工具會是非常實用的選擇。

["你可以提早前往", {"text": "地獄地牢", "color": "red", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": {"action": "change_page", "value": "21A521011401074F"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "前往地獄地牢任務"}}, "取得", {"text": "遠古遺骸", "color": "green"}, "，該地牢會生成於深板岩環帶中。"]

quest.3A1424B69AD511BD.quest_desc.original:
The &eActually Additions &aDrill&r consumes power to function and can be upgraded with several different augments.

A fully-charged drill is available from the &dMachinist's&r shop.
quest.3A1424B69AD511BD.quest_desc.translation:
《&e實用拓展&r》的&a鑽頭&r是一把耗能工具，能透過安裝升級來進一步擴充功能。

你可以在&d機械前輩&r的商店，買到一把滿電的鑽頭。

quest.3A53BB7A6B708966.quest_desc.original:
Once you hit &a45&r &6Eterna&r, you will be able to infuse shelves!

Making &cInfused Hellshelves&r requires at least &a30&r &cQuanta&r, while &bInfused Seashelves&r require &a15&r &cQuanta&r and &a10&r &dArcana&r.

Using &dInfused Bookshelves&r, you'll be able to hit a max of &a60&r &6Eterna&r for the next upgrade.
quest.3A53BB7A6B708966.quest_desc.translation:
當你達到 &a45&r &6位階&r後，就能開始灌注書櫃！

製作&c地獄灌注書櫃&r需要至少 &a30%&r &c量子化&r；

&b海洋灌注書櫃&r則需要 &a15%&r &c量子化&r與 &a10%&r &d阿卡那&r。

透過&d灌注書櫃&r，你可將&6位階&r提升至下一階段所需上限 &a60&r 。

quest.3A7774F5F0FD174E.quest_desc.original:
To get to the next upgrade, you want to get your &6Eterna&r to &a45&r. This can be done with upgraded shelves.

The &cHellshelf&r is easier to craft, and focuses on boosting &cQuanta&r.

&bSeashelves&r will require some fishing to get started, but instead builds up your &dArcana&r values instead.

&dSpirit Attuned Crystals&r from &6Occultism&r also work great for hitting the 45 mark.
quest.3A7774F5F0FD174E.quest_desc.translation:
要進入下一階段，你需要把&6位階&r提高至 &a45&r。
這能透過擺放進階書櫃達成。

&c地獄書櫃&r較容易製作，重點在提升&c量子化&r。

&b海洋書櫃&r起步需要先釣魚取得材料，但能有效拉高&d阿卡那&r。

來自《&6神祕學&r》的&d魔靈同調水晶&r也很適合拿來補足 45 門檻。

quest.3CFDFFDCDC306A83.quest_desc.original:
There are several extra items that you can craft to upgrade your &aKitchen Multiblock&r!

&aRacks&r will add tools to be used for your multiblock.

You can also store fruits in the &aFruit Basket&r.
quest.3CFDFFDCDC306A83.quest_desc.translation:
你還可以製作幾種額外物品，來升級你的&a廚房多方塊結構&r：

&a廚具架&r：可用於掛載並提供多方塊結構使用的工具。

你也可以將水果儲存在&a水果籃&r中。

quest.3D0DC34C36A173F5.quest_desc.original: &eOritech's &2Exo Suit&r provides very useful effects for exploring the world, but provide no protection against the dangers of leaving your home.
quest.3D0DC34C36A173F5.quest_desc.translation: 《&e起源科技&r》的&2外骨骼套裝&r能提供非常實用的探索能力，但對外出冒險時的危險並不提供防護。

quest.3E3A7F72F835E497.quest_desc.original:
To encourage exploring a variety of food, foods in this pack will grant you &6extra health&r the more you try!

To keep up with what foods you’ve eaten and your next culinary threshold, you can always look in the &aFood Book&r.
quest.3E3A7F72F835E497.quest_desc.translation:
為了鼓勵你嘗試各式各樣的美食，

在本模組包中，隨著你品嚐的食物種類增加，你會獲得額外的&6生命值上限&r。

為了記錄你已品嚐過的食物，以及準備下一個烹飪挑戰，建議你隨時查看&a食物手冊&r。

quest.3E50C85AFC627BDC.quest_desc.original:
Oritech's &#fcd205Prometheum &rtools are powerful unbreakable tools.

The &#fcd205Pickaxe&r has a regular, single-block mode with built-in silk touch, and an area mode that mines a 3x3 area.

The &#fcd205Battleaxe&r instantly breaks trees and deals a LOT of damage.

&eNote&r: To craft these, you will need the &aMachine Block&r &6World Engine Upgrade&r.
quest.3E50C85AFC627BDC.quest_desc.translation:
《&6起源科技&r》的&#fcd205普羅米修斯&r工具，既強大且不會損壞。

&#fcd205鎬&r具備一般單方塊模式（內建絲綢之觸），也有可挖掘 3x3 的範圍模式。

&#fcd205戰斧&r可瞬間砍倒整棵樹，並造成非常高的傷害。

&e注意&r：要製作這些工具，你需要先有&a機器方塊&r&6世界引擎升級&r。

quest.3FE863C60B2D2719.quest_desc.original:
The &dDisenchanter&r from &6Draconic Evolution&r can be used to strip enchantments off an item at the cost of experience and some durability damage to the item.

The damage can be reduced by placing bookshelves around the &dDisenchanter&r, similar to a regular enchanting setup.
quest.3FE863C60B2D2719.quest_desc.translation:
來自《&6龍族進化&r》的&d附魔拆解台&r可以用來分離物品上的附魔，
代價是消耗經驗值，並會對物品造成一定的耐久度損耗。

這種損耗可以透過在&d附魔拆解台&r周圍放置書櫃來減輕，擺放方式與一般的附魔台設置類似。

quest.4080C053E58A8B55.quest_desc.original:
&6Baubley Heart Canisters'&r weapons add +1 base damage for each &bHeart Canister&r inserted into them, for up to +96 base damage.

&eNote&r: To craft these, you will need the &dSpirit&r and &aMachine Block&r &6World Engine Upgrades&r. 

&7&oHearts must be inserted via their interfaces.
quest.4080C053E58A8B55.quest_desc.translation:
《&6心形墜飾&r》的武器，每當你安裝一個&b心罐&r，就能為武器增加 1 點攻擊力，最多可疊加至「96」點。

&e注意&r：要製作這些武器，你必須先有&d魂銀&r和&a機器方塊&r&6世界引擎升級&r。 

&7&o心罐只能透過介面安裝。

quest.4111541EAEF0E4FC.quest_desc.original:
The &dQuantum&r armor provides netherite-tier protection, with the ability to be upgraded with a variety of &bModules&r via a keybind.

The &eOpen Quantum Armor Configuration&r key isn't bound by default.
quest.4111541EAEF0E4FC.quest_desc.translation:
&d量子&r盔甲能提供獄髓級別的保護，且能藉由安裝&b模組&r，獲得各式各樣的能力。


「&e開啟量子盔甲設定介面&r」快捷鍵，預設為未綁定狀態。

quest.4119A43052DB5E3E.quest_desc.original:
The &eRelics&r mod adds 25 new and unique items, each with the ability to level up and grant unique abilities for those who wish to use them!

These can be found in loot, but can also be bought from the shop!
quest.4119A43052DB5E3E.quest_desc.translation:
《&e遺物&r》模組新增了 25 種獨一無二的新飾品，
每一件都具備升級能力，並能為使用者提供獨特的特殊能力！

你可以在戰利品中找到這些遺物，也可以直接從商店購買！

quest.427682661459BB4F.quest_desc.original:
&cQuanta&r adds randomness to your enchanting rolls, and at max chaos, you will end up with either +100% or -100% power.

&eStabilization&r cancels out the negative effects, meaning you get all the upside, and none of the downside.
quest.427682661459BB4F.quest_desc.translation:
&c量子化&r會增加附魔結果的隨機性；在混沌值拉滿時，
你可能得到 +100% 或 -100% 的強度結果。

&e穩定化&r可抵銷負面影響，讓你保留加成、避免減損。

quest.4498E3F4B2DC24FC.quest_desc.original:
To get started on getting your ultimate &eApotheosis&r gear, you'll need to fight monsters and explore the world for &bGems&r!

&bGems&r are crystals that provide powerful bonuses when applied to &bAffix&r items.
{@pagebreak}
To apply a &bGem&r to an item, you must combine it with the item in a &aSmithing Table&r. The item must have an open &aGem Socket&r for this to work.

Gems give different bonuses when slotted in different item types, and can be upgraded in the &aGem Cutting Table&r.

&cUnique Gems&r can only be socketed once per item, while most other gems can be socketed multiple times for stacking bonuses.

There are a variety of &eApotheosis&r &bGems&r, which you can get by killing mobs and bosses.
{@pagebreak}
&bGems&r can also be crushed by an anvil to create &aGem Dust&r.

You can use &aGem Dust&r for a variety of things, but the first thing you'll want to make is a &aSalvaging Table&r!
quest.4498E3F4B2DC24FC.quest_desc.translation:
想打造你的終極《&e神化&r》裝備，第一步就是狩獵怪物、探索世界，並收集&b寶石&r！

&b寶石&r是能鑲嵌在&b詞綴&r物品上的水晶，能提供強力加成。
{@pagebreak}
要把&b寶石&r鑲嵌在物品上，必須在&a鍛造台&r中將兩者合成，且該物品需有可用的&a寶石鑲嵌槽&r。

寶石在不同裝備類型上，會提供不同加成，並可在&a寶石切割台&r中進一步升級。

&c獨特寶石&r表示每件物品只能鑲嵌一次；多數其他寶石則可多次鑲嵌以疊加效果。

《&e神化&r》有多種&b寶石&r，可透過擊殺怪物與 Boss 取得。
{@pagebreak}
&b寶石&r也可用鐵砧壓碎，製成&a寶石粉&r。

&a寶石粉&r有許多用途，而你最優先該做的是&a分解台&r！

quest.44C341DE3BCD64CC.quest_desc.original:
This upgraded version of the &dEnchantment Library&r can store enchantments values up to level 31.

&7&oPlease note that the actual enchanted books are still capped at normal pack limits.&r
quest.44C341DE3BCD64CC.quest_desc.translation:
這個強化版的&d附魔圖書館&r，可儲存最高到 31 級的附魔。

&7&o請注意，實際附魔書仍受本模組包的附魔上限限制。&r

quest.464AED8311A32476.quest_desc.original:
Before we dive into &eApotheosis&r, we need to cover what an &bAffix&r is!

An &bAffix&r is the driving force behind all &eApotheosis&r gear. Each &bAffix&r is very similar to an enchantment, providing a bonus to the item it is attached to.
{@pagebreak}
&bAffix&r items can be found when exploring the world and their effects vary based on the item's rarity. They are more commonly dropped from &eApotheosis&r boss monsters which can be found in underground caves or have a chance to randomly appear during the night.

There are a few different types of &bAffixes&r, each affecting a specific part of the item such as: Stats, Effects, Durability, and &bGem Sockets&r, which will be covered in the &bGems&r section.
quest.464AED8311A32476.quest_desc.translation:
在開始深入《&e神化&r》前，先了解什麼是&b詞綴&r！

&b詞綴&r是所有《&e神化&r》裝備的核心。每個詞綴都類似附魔，會為刻寫的物品提供額外加成。
{@pagebreak}
&b詞綴&r物品可在探索世界時取得，效果會隨稀有度而變化。它們更常由《&e神化&r》Boss 怪掉落；這些 Boss 會在地下洞窟出現，或在夜晚隨機刷新。

&b詞綴&r有多種類型，分別影響裝備的不同面向，例如：屬性、效果、耐久與&b寶石鑲嵌槽&r；寶石鑲嵌槽會在&b寶石&r章節中詳細說明。

quest.496903AB7E8A0A92.quest_desc.original:
&eIron's Gems \&\ Jewelry&r is a mod that focus on combining materials and &bJewels&r to provide the player with special effects or stat increases.

You will need to craft a &aJewelcrafting Station&r to begin making some basic &bJewelry&r.

To learn more advanced &bJewelry&r, you will need to find their blueprints by trading with villagers, or making a purchase from the &6Shop&r.

Most &bJewelry&r consists of a &aBand Metal&r and a &aGem&r.
quest.496903AB7E8A0A92.quest_desc.translation:
《&e艾倫的珠寶與首飾&r》是一款著重於結合材料與&b寶石&r，為玩家提供特殊效果或屬性提升的模組。

你需要先製作&a珠寶飾品工作台&r，才能開始製作基礎&b飾品&r。

若要學習更進階的&b飾品&r，需要與村民交易取得藍圖，或直接在&6商店&r購買。

大多數&b飾品&r由&a戒指材料&r與&a寶石&r組成。

quest.4BCA8A5C3F80D375.quest_desc.original:
The &aSigil of Unnaming&r removes the Affix name of an item, reverting it to its normal item name.

For example: &dEndawn the Ogre Slayer's Windswept Burnt Shoes of the Spellwarden&r will be renamed to &dBurnt Shoes&r.
quest.4BCA8A5C3F80D375.quest_desc.translation:
&a除名咒符&r可移除物品名稱中的詞綴，讓名稱恢復為物品原始名稱。

例如：&d森亞琉琉歌的疊高高冰淇淋《我的母親》&r會還原為&d冰淇淋&r。

quest.4D64F277A4330749.quest_desc.original:
&6B.E.E.R. (Bookshelf Extended Enchanting Reach)&r allows you to modify the range that enchanting tables scan for bookshelves!

Normally, enchanting tables only look for bookshelves in a 5x5x3 area around them. With &6B.E.E.R.&r, you can extend this out further!

To modify an enchanting table's range, you just need to hold a &amodifier block&r in your main hand and Sneak + Right-click it on the table.

Holding a piece of &anether quartz&r in your offhand will decrease the range instead.
quest.4D64F277A4330749.quest_desc.translation:
《&6B.E.E.R.&r》讓你可以修改附魔台偵測書櫃的範圍！

一般情況下，附魔台只會偵測周圍 5x5x3 區域內的書櫃。

有了《&6B.E.E.R.&r》之後，你可以將這個範圍擴張到更遠！

要修改附魔台的範圍，你只需要在慣用手上拿著&a修改用方塊&r，對著附魔台「Shift + 點擊右鍵」即可。

若非慣用手上還拿著&a地獄石英&r，則會改為縮小範圍。

quest.4DE483256F9E1D4F.quest_desc.original:
The &aSigil of Withdrawal&r will remove all socketed &bGems&r on an item without damaging your item.

These can also be bought from the &zShop&r!
quest.4DE483256F9E1D4F.quest_desc.translation:
&a卸除咒符&r可移除物品上已鑲嵌的所有&b寶石&r，且不會損壞物品本體。

這也可以在&z商店&r購買！

quest.511B01F40006FC4B.quest_desc.original:
&zInfinity Tools&r are unbreakable tools that can instantly break blocks.

The &zPickaxe&r and &zShovel&r can be 'Shift + Right-Clicked' to toggle modes, instantly vaporizing large areas of your world.
quest.511B01F40006FC4B.quest_desc.translation:
&z無盡工具&r本身不會損壞，且能夠瞬間破壞方塊。

&z鎬子&r與&z鏟子&r可以透過「Shift + 右鍵」來切換模式，

讓你所在世界的大範圍區域，瞬間消失殆盡。

quest.51EBCDC63A047562.quest_desc.original:
There are 3 sets of armor available through &eMalum&r.

&aSoulhunter Armor&r provides slightly more than leather-tier protection.

&bSoulstained Armor&r provides diamond-tier protection.

&dMalignant Stronghold Armor&r provides netherite-tier protection.
quest.51EBCDC63A047562.quest_desc.translation:
&e靈災&r提供三套可用盔甲。

&a靈魂獵手盔甲&r的防護力略高於皮革盔甲。

&b魂染鋼盔甲&r具備鑽石盔甲等級的防護力。

&d惡念要塞盔甲&r具備獄髓盔甲等級的防護力。

quest.5388B67410670702.quest_desc.original:
["", {"text": "Draconic", "color": "gold"}, " weapons are upgraded versions of ", {"text": "Wyvern", "color": "light_purple", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "2C141655079AC173" }, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Wyvern Weapons Quest"}}, " weapons, with room for more ", {"text": "Upgrade Modules", "color": "green"}, " and better customizability."]

You can also craft the &6Draconic Staff of Power&r, an All-In-One tool and weapon.

Their module inventory can be accessed via the keybind &eTool Modules&r, which isn't bound by default.
quest.5388B67410670702.quest_desc.translation:
["", {"text": "神龍武器", "color": "gold"}, "是", {"text": "雙足飛龍武器", "color": "light_purple", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "0B65713A23351790" }, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "前往雙足飛龍武器任務"}}, "的升級版本，擁有更多", {"text": "升級模組", "color": "green"}, "空間與更高自訂性。"]

你也可以製作&6神龍力量權杖&r，這是一把將工具與武器合二為一的裝備。

其模組欄位可透過「&e升級模組介面&r」快捷鍵開啟，預設為
「Shift + C」。

&e注意&r：要製作此物品，你必須先擁有&c高級機器方塊&r&6世界引擎升級&r。

quest.57DF1A1F0556B970.quest_desc.original:
&6Industrial Foregoing&r has several machines that can help you when dealing with enchantments.

The &dEnchantment Applicator&r works like a mechanical anvil. Instead of using experience to enchant items, it will use &aEssence&r instead.

The &dEnchantment Sorter&r will filter enchanted items from non-enchanted items, placing anything that's enchanted in the top output. You can send these to different sides for extraction via pipes.
{@pagebreak}
The &dEnchantment Extractor&r will strip down enchanted books from enchanted items when provided with books, effectively harvesting enchants off unused gear.

The &dEnchantment Factory&r will automatically enchant books with enchantment level of 30 using a good amount of &aEssence&r.
quest.57DF1A1F0556B970.quest_desc.translation:
《&6工業先鋒&r》提供多種機器來協助你處理附魔相關事務：

&d自動附魔鐵砧&r：運作方式類似機械化的鐵砧。它不消耗經驗值，而是使用&a精華液&r來為物品附魔。

&d附魔物品分類器&r：會將有附魔與沒附魔的物品分開，並將任何帶有附魔的物品從上方輸出。你可以透過管道，從機器的不同側，分別將它們提取出來。
{@pagebreak}
&d附魔提取器&r：只要提供書，它就能將附魔從物品上分離並轉移至書上，讓你有效回收沒用到的裝備附魔。

&d電動附魔台&r：會消耗大量的&a精華液&r，自動為書附上相當於 30 級的附魔。

quest.58DDBF43D54AF67F.quest_desc.original: &eMalum&r weapons often have special abilities that synergize very well with other features of the mod, dealing significant amounts of damage.
quest.58DDBF43D54AF67F.quest_desc.translation: &e靈災&r的武器通常具備特殊能力，能和模組內其他機制形成良好連動，打出可觀傷害。

quest.59CBFA5583139A3B.quest_desc.original: The &dReforging Table&r is an improved version of the &aSimple Reforging Table&r, allowing you to reforge items of all rarities, including &zMythic&r items.
quest.59CBFA5583139A3B.quest_desc.translation: &d重鑄台&r是&a簡易重鑄台&r的進階版本，可重鑄所有稀有度物品，包含&z神話&r稀有度。

quest.5AC7EEC3D69AF032.quest_desc.original:
&bCelestigem&r tools are the next tier of tools from &6Just Dire Things&r.

Instead of using durability, these tools use &cenergy&r instead, and can have even more upgrades that can be installed.

These can be made once you've made a trip out to the &dAncient City&r and made &dVoidshimmer Goo&r.
quest.5AC7EEC3D69AF032.quest_desc.translation:
&b天體寶石&r工具是《&6Just Dire Things&r》的下一階工具。

這些工具以&c能量&r取代耐久，並可安裝更多升級。

前往&d遠古城市&r並製作出&d虛輝凝漿&r後即可製作。

quest.5B7448EEC26FF0E3.quest_desc.original:
The &aCooking Table&r is the first big craft you'll want to make to get started making your kitchen!

This block acts as the main crafting table for foods, and is the centerpiece of your &aKitchen Multiblock&r. When opened, it will show you every food you can make based on what you have stored in the multiblock and what appliances you have connected.

You can expand your kitchen by adding &aCabinets&r or &aCounters&r.

&eNote&r: Certain mods won't connect with it, like the &bFarmer's Delight Cooking Pot&r. Make sure to always check JEI for specific recipes!
quest.5B7448EEC26FF0E3.quest_desc.translation:
&a烹飪台&r是你在打造廚房時，第一個需要製作的大型物件！

這個方塊是食物的主要工作台，也是你&a廚房多方塊結構&r的核心。

開啟後，它會根據你儲存在結構中的食材，以及連接的設備，顯示出所有你可以製作的料理。

你可以透過加入&a廚房櫃&r或&a流理台&r來擴張你的廚房。

&e注意&r：某些模組的設備無法與其連接，例如&b《農夫樂事》的烹飪鍋&r。
請務必查看 JEI，以確認特定配方的製作方式！

quest.5D20790BCDE45CF9.quest_desc.original:
The &dEnderic Railgun&r from &6Oritech&r is a powerful ranged weapon that fires a high-speed projectile, dealing significant damage to enemies and breaking blocks at a distance.

Left mouse button can fire a continuous beam that damages any entities in its path and can also mine the first block in line. Energy will be transferred to an energy containing block instead of breaking it. It can also transform mined blocks, similar to the &aEnderic Laser&r.
{@pagebreak}
Mining-Mode can be toggled by Sneak + Right-Clicking with the item in hand.

Using the right mouse button fires a powerful projectile that explodes at the target location, destroying nearby blocks and entities.
quest.5D20790BCDE45CF9.quest_desc.translation:
《&6起源科技&r》的&d終界雷射砲&r，是一把強力遠程武器，可發射高速彈體，對敵人造成可觀傷害，並能遠距離破壞方塊。

左鍵可發射持續光束，會傷害路徑上的任何實體，也能挖掘前方第一個方塊。

若目標方塊可儲存能量，會優先傳輸能量而非破壞。

它也能像&a終界雷射&r一樣轉化挖掘出的方塊。
{@pagebreak}
手持此物品時，可用「潛行 + 右鍵」切換挖掘模式。

右鍵會發射強力彈體，於目標位置爆炸並摧毀周遭方塊與實體。

quest.5DF92F096DB91299.quest_desc.original: The &dMeka-Tool&r is a power-consuming tool that can be upgraded and customized in a &aModification Station&r with a variety of &bModules&r to improve its performance.&r
quest.5DF92F096DB91299.quest_desc.translation: &dMeka-工具&r是一把耗能工具，你能在&a改裝站&r中，安裝各種&b模組&r進行升級與客製化，進一步提升性能。

quest.5E2F4A6147694D5C.quest_desc.original:
["", {"text": "Chaotic", "color": "rainbow"}, " tools are the final upgrades to ", {"text": "Draconic", "color": "gold", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "11A35E8F97ACA240" }, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Draconic Tools Quest"}}, " tools, with the most room for ", {"text": "Upgrade Modules", "color": "green"}, " and maximum customizability."]

You can also upgrade into or craft the &zChaotic Staff of Power&r, an All-In-One tool and weapon.

Their module inventory can be accessed via the keybind &eTool Modules&r, which isn't bound by default.
quest.5E2F4A6147694D5C.quest_desc.translation:
["", {"text": "混沌工具", "color": "rainbow"}, "是", {"text": "神龍工具", "color": "gold", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "11A35E8F97ACA240" }, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "前往神龍工具任務"}}, "的最終升級，擁有最多的", {"text": "升級模組", "color": "green"}, "空間與最高自訂性。"]

你也可以升級或直接製作&z混沌力量權杖&r，這是一把將工具與武器合二為一的裝備。

其模組欄位可透過「&e升級模組介面&r」快捷鍵開啟，預設為
「Shift + C」。

quest.5ED10C54AE06DB40.quest_desc.original:
&zInfinity Armor&r negates all damage to the player and provides jump boost and movement speed.

&eNote&r: You will need the entire set to prevent damage.
quest.5ED10C54AE06DB40.quest_desc.translation:
&z無盡盔甲&r能為玩家抵銷所有傷害，並提供跳躍與移動速度加成。

&e注意&r：你需要裝備整套盔甲才能完全免疫傷害。

quest.5FFC80176D33E4E1.quest_desc.original:
&6ProjectE&r gear negates a percentage of damage when equipped, with &cRed Matter&r gear having the strongest reduction of damage overall.

&eNote&r: To craft these, you must have the &aMachine Block&r &6World Engine Upgrade&r.
quest.5FFC80176D33E4E1.quest_desc.translation:
裝備《&6等價交換&r》的裝備時，可減免一定比例傷害，其中&c紅物質&r裝備的減傷效果最強。

&e注意&r：要製作這些裝備，你必須先有&a機器方塊&r&6世界引擎升級&r。

quest.60FDF616DEDE5E73.quest_desc.original:
&eApotheosis&r overhauls exploration and combat by creating a more RPG-like experience.

Items and mobs you can find in the world can have special &bAffixes&r on them, making them much stronger, and sometimes giving them special abilities to make things even more fun!

If you feel lost, you can always refer to the &aChronicle of Shadows&r, which is the guidebook for the mod.
quest.60FDF616DEDE5E73.quest_desc.translation:
《&e神化&r》改造了探索與戰鬥流程，帶來更接近 RPG 的體驗。

你在世界中遇到的物品與怪物，都可能帶有特殊&b詞綴&r，讓它們更強，甚至擁有額外能力，戰鬥也更有變化！

若你一時摸不著頭緒，可以隨時查閱本模組的指南手冊《&a闇影編年史&r》。

quest.620F29613800DC94.quest_desc.original:
The &aRune Inscribed Ring&r pattern allows you to inscribe &dRunes&r from the &6Iron's Spells&r mod.

These &dRunes&r will empower the ring with different powers. Make sure to experiment!

&eNote&r: This can only be bought from the &dEnchanter's&r &zShop&r.
quest.620F29613800DC94.quest_desc.translation:
&a銘刻符文之戒&r的卷軸，可讓你刻印來自《&6艾倫的法術&r》模組的&d符文&r。

這些&d符文&r會為戒指賦予不同能力，記得多嘗試各種搭配！

&e注意&r：此卷軸只能在&d附魔道長&r的&z商店&r購買。

quest.64B237B611F88036.quest_desc.original:
&dEclipse Alloy&r is the final tier from &6Just Dire Things&r.

These are powered armors that can use the best upgrades from the mod.

These can be made once you've defeated the &dChicken Jockey&r and made &dShadowpulse Goo&r.
quest.64B237B611F88036.quest_desc.translation:
&d日蝕合金&r是《&6Just Dire Things&r》的最終盔甲階級。

這些是耗能盔甲，可使用模組中最頂級的升級。

擊敗&d雞騎士&r並製作出&d影脈凝漿&r後即可製作。

quest.6B584FB6F2EEBCD0.quest_desc.original:
&dArcane Essence&r can be useful in making your first magic armor set from &6Iron's Spells&r.

When combined with a piece of leather armor, it creates a piece of the &aWandering Magician Set&r.

Once you have a good bit of essence, you can create the &dWizard&r set using &dArcane Cloth&r.

These are both great starting sets for slinging spells.
quest.6B584FB6F2EEBCD0.quest_desc.translation:
&d奧術源質&r可用來製作你在《&6艾倫的法術&r》的第一套魔法盔甲。

將它與皮革盔甲結合，可製作&a流浪法師套裝&r的部件。

當你累積到足夠源質後，就能使用&d奧術布匹&r製作&d巫師套裝&r。

這兩套都是非常適合前期施法的起手裝備。

quest.6C7F31673B12795D.quest_desc.original:
&dEclipse Alloy&r is the final tier from &6Just Dire Things&r.

These are powered weapons that can use the best upgrades from the mod.

These can be made once you've defeated the &dChicken Jockey&r and made &dShadowpulse Goo&r.
quest.6C7F31673B12795D.quest_desc.translation:
&d日蝕合金&r是《&6Just Dire Things&r》的最終武器階級。

這些是耗能武器，可使用模組中最頂級的升級。

擊敗&d雞騎士&r並製作出&d影脈凝漿&r後即可製作。

quest.6EE1C1B7FFB86C6C.quest_desc.original:
&aSigils of Socketing&r are used to increase the number of &bGem Sockets&r of an &bAffix&r item.

These can also be bought from the &zShop&r!
quest.6EE1C1B7FFB86C6C.quest_desc.translation:
&a鑲嵌咒符&r可增加&b詞綴&r物品的&b寶石鑲嵌槽&r數量。

這也可以在&z商店&r購買！

quest.700716B4ACCBD4F4.quest_desc.original:
["The ", {"text": "Draconic Chestpiece", "color": "gold"}, " is an upgraded versions of the ", {"text": "Wyvern Chestpiece", "color": "light_purple", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "69997DAB93184551" }, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Wyvern Chestpiece Quest"}}, ", with room for more ", {"text": "Upgrade Modules", "color": "green"}, "."]

Its module inventory can be accessed via the keybind &eTool Modules&r, which isn't bound by default.
quest.700716B4ACCBD4F4.quest_desc.translation:
["", {"text": "神龍護胸", "color": "gold"}, "是", {"text": "雙足飛龍護胸", "color": "light_purple", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "464C0012A47EFDE4" }, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "前往雙足飛龍護胸任務"}}, "的升級版本，擁有更多", {"text": "升級模組", "color": "green"}, "空間。"]

其模組欄位可透過「&e升級模組介面&r」快捷鍵開啟，預設為
「Shift + C」。

&e注意&r：要製作此物品，你必須先擁有&c高級機器方塊&r&6世界引擎升級&r。

quest.70D5BEA5CC437AB6.quest_desc.original:
Got a lot of random enchanted gear? Using a &dTome of Scrapping&r, you can break it down and extract some of the enchantments from it.

The &dTome of Extraction&r will also remove all enchants, but will keep the item from being destroyed, allowing you to remove and replace any number of enchantments on an item at will.

If you're looking for a specific enchantment for a specific tool, you can use &dTomes&r which can be crafted to only support a certain class of enchantments.
quest.70D5BEA5CC437AB6.quest_desc.translation:
手上有一堆隨機附魔的裝備嗎？使用&d拆解寶典&r，可分解裝備並從中取出部分附魔。

&d提取寶典&r同樣可移除所有附魔，但不會破壞物品，讓你能自由替換同一件裝備上的附魔。

若你要替特定工具找特定附魔，也可製作只支援特定附魔類型的&d寶典&r。

quest.722901B4259D8AEC.quest_desc.original:
The next goal will be to hit &a60&r &6Eterna&r, &a40&r &cQuanta&r, and &a40&r &dArcana&r.

This will require upgrading the &dInfused Bookshelves&r.
quest.722901B4259D8AEC.quest_desc.translation:
下一個目標是達到 &a60&r &6位階&r、&a40%&r &c量子化&r 與 &a40%&r &d阿卡那&r。

這需要進一步升級&d灌注書櫃&r。

quest.7244348CAB8356E0.quest_desc.original:
["The ", {"text": "Chaotic Chestpiece", "color": "rainbow"}, " is the final upgrade to the ", {"text": "Draconic Chestpiece", "color": "gold", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "5388B67410670702" }, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Draconic Chestpiece Quest"}}, ", with the most room for ", {"text": "Upgrade Modules", "color": "green"}, " and maximum customizability."]

Its module inventory can be accessed via the keybind &eTool Modules&r, which isn't set by default.
quest.7244348CAB8356E0.quest_desc.translation:
["", {"text": "混沌護胸", "color": "rainbow"}, "是", {"text": "神龍護胸", "color": "gold", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "700716B4ACCBD4F4" }, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "前往神龍護胸任務"}}, "的最終升級，擁有最多的", {"text": "升級模組", "color": "green"}, "空間與最高自訂性。"]

其模組欄位可透過「&e升級模組介面&r」快捷鍵開啟，預設為
「Shift + C」。

quest.7244D5DADCF0D7A2.quest_desc.original:
The &bSeashelf of Aquatic Filtration&r can be loaded with up to six enchanted books, and will block those enchantments from showing up again.

Works with &cCursed Enchants&r as well!
quest.7244D5DADCF0D7A2.quest_desc.translation:
&b海洋篩選書櫃&r最多可放入六本附魔書，並阻止這些附魔再次出現在附魔結果中。

對&c詛咒附魔&r也同樣有效！

quest.73871351B8E5775B.quest_desc.original:
If you are more of a spellcaster and want to power up your spells, &6Iron's Spells&r has plenty of options for gearing up.

There are many different armor sets that provide powerful buffs to different spell schools.
quest.73871351B8E5775B.quest_desc.translation:
若你有偏好的法術學派、想強化你的施法能力，《&6艾倫的法術&r》提供了很多裝備選擇。

這裡有許多不同的盔甲套裝，能為各種學派提供強力增益。

quest.744120E37CD03AE0.quest_desc.original:
The &aAtomic Disassembler&r from &6Mekanism&r is an unbreakable tool that consumes power to break blocks.

It functions as a pickaxe, axe, and shovel simultaneously.
quest.744120E37CD03AE0.quest_desc.translation:
《&6通用機械&r》的&a原子分解機&r是一把不會損壞、以能量破壞方塊的工具。

它同時具備鎬、斧與鏟的功能。

quest.749634B68269401A.quest_desc.original:
&6ProjectE&r has several very strong weapons that can be made once you have your hands on enough EMC and a &cNetherite Smithing Template&r.

These weapons have different modes that can be used to empower them to do even more damage or increase the AoE range.

&eNote&r: To craft these, you must have the &aMachine Block&r &6World Engine Upgrade&r.
quest.749634B68269401A.quest_desc.translation:
當你取得足夠的 EMC 與&c獄髓鍛造模板&r後，《&6等價交換&r》
可製作多種非常強力的武器。

這些武器擁有不同的模式，可用於強化攻擊威力，或擴大攻擊範圍。

&e注意&r：要製作這些武器，你必須先有&a機器方塊&r&6世界引擎升級&r。

quest.7552BF792403EF44.quest_desc.original: &3Enchanting Clues&r give you more text on the enchanting table, letting you see more of what's going to be put onto your books and items before you click the button.
quest.7552BF792403EF44.quest_desc.translation: &3附魔提示&r可在附魔台顯示更多提示文字，讓你在按下按鈕前，先看到更多即將附到書本與裝備上的內容。

quest.75DB0E723089281E.quest_desc.original:
There are several appliances you can connect to your &aKitchen Multiblock&r!

The &aSink&r will provide access to recipes that require Water. You will need to provide water to the Sink; it is not infinite.

The &aFridge&r is the perfect place to store cold items, and can be upgraded to provide more recipes for your &bKitchen Multiblock&r!

The &aOven&r will provide access to recipes that require the use of a furnace or smoker as long as it has fuel.
quest.75DB0E723089281E.quest_desc.translation:
你可以為你的&a廚房多方塊結構&r連接多種設備：

&a水槽&r：提供需要用到「水」的配方。你需要手動為水槽供水，它並非無限水源。

&a冰箱&r：儲存低溫物品的絕佳地點，升級後還能為你的&b廚房多方塊結構&r提供更多配方！

&a烤箱&r：只要放入燃料，就能提供需要使用熔爐，或煙燻爐進行烹飪的配方。

quest.777F76601D213DF2.quest_desc.original:
The &eSimply Swords&r mod adds a wide range of weapons that you can choose to craft.

&dRunic Weapons&r require &dRunic Tablets&r found by exploring the world.

&6Unique Weapons&r can also be rarely found during your explorations, though some may also be crafted.
quest.777F76601D213DF2.quest_desc.translation:
《&e簡易刀劍&r》模組加入了多樣化的武器供你選擇與製作。

&d符文武器&r需要消耗探索世界取得的&d符文石板&r來進行製作。

在探索過程中也有極低機率發現&6獨特武器&r，不過其中一部分也可以透過合成獲得。

quest.78C4840B377E14FD.quest_desc.original:
The &aEnchanter&r from &6EnderIO&r is an &dEnchantment Table&r that allows you to pick which enchantment you want to make.

When provided with specific items and &2Experience&r, you can enchant &aBook \&\ Quills&r with an enchantment of your choice.

To see which enchantments you can make, make sure to check out the uses in JEI!
quest.78C4840B377E14FD.quest_desc.translation:
來自《&6EnderIO&r》的&a附魔器&r，是一種可以讓你自由挑選想要製作哪種附魔的設備。

只要提供特定的物品與&2經驗值&r，你就可以將&a書和羽毛筆&r附魔成你指定的附魔書。

想知道可以製作哪些附魔，請透過 JEI 查看此機器的用途！

quest.7ACCC2EECD9883FD.quest_desc.original: &eCognition&r tools are as good as diamond gear with an extra block interaction range.
quest.7ACCC2EECD9883FD.quest_desc.translation: 來自《&e認知&r》的工具，具有鑽石級別的性能，且附帶更遠的方塊互動距離。

quest.7B496376BC7B399A.quest_desc.original: &aThe Ender&r is a diamond-tier sword that specializes in beheading your enemies.
quest.7B496376BC7B399A.quest_desc.translation: &a終結之劍&r是一把鑽石級別的劍，其特別之處在於能用來斬你的敵人首級。

quest.7B6A17901EC8180C.quest_desc.original: The &zRed Morningstar&r is the ultimate all-in-one tool from &6ProjectE&r.
quest.7B6A17901EC8180C.quest_desc.translation: &z紅物質釘頭錘&r是來自《&6等價交換&r》的終極全能工具。

quest.7E88C7654F281E43.quest_desc.original:
The &#EA6F14Augmenting Table&r is an end-game crafting station used to augment the individual affixes on an item.

It can upgrade an existing Affix at the cost of two &#EA6F14Sigils of Enhancement&r, or can reroll affixes at the cost of 1 &#EA6F14Sigil of Enhancement&r.
quest.7E88C7654F281E43.quest_desc.translation:
&#EA6F14詞綴改造台&r是遊戲後期的工作站，用來強化物品上的單一詞綴。

可消耗兩個&#EA6F14強化咒符&r來升級現有詞綴，或消耗一個&#EA6F14強化咒符&r來重洗詞綴。
